title: Utopia Towels 8-Piece Luxury Towel Set, 2 Bath Towels, 2 Hand Towels, and 4 Wash Cloths, 500 GSM, 97% Ring Spun Cotton Highly Absorbent Viscose Stripe Towels Ideal for Everyday use (Cool Grey)
features: Set of 8 towels - Includes 2 bath towels, each measuring 69 x 137 cm; 2 hand towels, each measuring 41 x 71 cm and 4 washcloths, each measuring 30 x 30 cm.
Highly absorbent towels - Our 500 GSM high density towels are ultra-absorbent and fast drying. Gives your skin a soft and delicate touch while absorbing all traces of moisture efficiently.
97% Ring spun cotton- These luxurious towels are made of 97% cotton giving you a super soft feel every time you use them. The surface is smooth and not easy to shed, adding to their durability.

Elegant Viscose striped design - Elegantly designed viscose woven stripes have a brilliant shine and add to the luxurious look of the towels. They are sure to give your bathrooms, spas and kitchen a touch of sophistication.

Care instructions - Machine wash the towels in warm water using light detergent and tumble dry on low setting; recommended to dry immediately. Do not use bleach, fabric softeners, or iron the towels as it may damage their quality. Always wash the towels separately to minimize lint.
description: Product Description Indulge in self-care, with our extravagant 8 piece towel set that gives a delicate feel to your skin. Relish in the luxuriant and chic bath towels, tailored for you and your elegant style! Experience the warmth of the cozy body towels, as you step out of the tub or shower. Worth the splurge! Escape to a fluffy cloud with these super soft and absorbent bath towels. The pack of towels has hemmed sides, to give a splendid finish while maintaining their durability. Recreate a spa-like environment at home, with this all-encompassing towel set. EASY CARE GUIDE · Ideal Washing Temperature: Wash the towels at around 30 degrees to preserve them for a long time and keep them soft. · Light Detergent : It is recommended to use a light detergent. · Do not use bleach: Avoid using bleach, fabric softener, chemical, or iron on the towels. Burst of Splendid Hues The towel set comprises of different colors, which offers you a plethora of color schemes to match the style and décor of your bathroom. The luxury bath towels are the perfect accessory to enhance the chic of your household. Radiate Your Beautiful Self Give your skin that magic touch with our absorbent bath towels that offer high absorbency and versatility. Gym Buddy to Break A Sweat! A good gym towel can make or break your gym experience. Make this your new gym buddy, keeping you healthy and acts as a cushion for machines. Start Living and Stay Classy! Relish and feel invigorated as if you are at any beauty salon, tanning salon, nail salon, or spa. Perfectly Crafted For you! Recreate a top-notch level of luxury in your bathroom, with this body towel set, that touches your skin and provides comfort and efficacy in drying.
